case_title: EUGENIE CHAN ET AL VS. RICHARD CARRINGTON

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED AUG-13-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARRINGTON, RICHARD
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY CHAN, EUGENIE GOYETTE, MARTIN CARRINGTON, RICHARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, EUGENIE GOYETTE, MARTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARRINGTON, RICHARD $1,316.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,421.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHAN, EUGENIE GOYETTE, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT CARRINGTON, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-16-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-16-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS EUGENIA CHAN & MARTIN GOYETTE, AND DEFENDANT RICHARD CARRINGTON. MARIA YAHCICH, A REPRESENTATIVE FROM GEICO INSURANCE AND WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CARRINGTON, RICHARD
